note: Deployed to the Pharos Atlantic Testnet (chain id 688689). TreasuryPolicy + GuardLog broadcast via script/Deploy.s.sol with the agent wired and native limits seeded. The legacy Pharos Testnet (688688, testnet.dplabs-internal.com) is no longer reachable; Atlantic is the current developer testnet.

verification.note: Run from packages/contracts: forge verify-contract <address> src/TreasuryPolicy.sol:TreasuryPolicy --chain-id 688689 --verifier blockscout --verifier-url https://atlantic.pharosscan.xyz/api . If the verifier endpoint is unavailable, set "attempted": true and "verified": false here and record the failure reason.
